expectations.text: Agent uses podman to run PMD (not local install)
Agent mounts the input directory to /src
expectations.evidence: Command includes '-v ...input:/src:Z'. SARIF artifact URIs show /src/ paths.

expectations.text: Agent uses -R /src/config/pmd-ruleset.xml to reference custom ruleset
Agent generates SARIF format report (-f sarif)
expectations.evidence: Command includes '-f sarif'. Output is valid SARIF format.

expectations.text: SARIF report file is generated and non-empty
expectations.evidence: pmd-report.sarif exists at outputs/, 27354 bytes, valid SARIF JSON.

expectations.text: Violations from error-prone and code-style rules found
Agent detects that legacy ruleset paths need PMD 7.x update
expectations.evidence: Agent did not detect or report the PMD 6.x vs 7.x path incompatibility issue.
